name: vertex-palace
description: Memory-palace context routing for Codex coding tasks.

interface.shortDescription: Route Codex through a structured project knowledge palace.
interface.longDescription: Vertex Palace builds a spatial index for repositories and lets Codex retrieve only the needed floors, rooms, drawers, files, and symbols before coding.
defaultPrompt: Use Vertex Palace to index this repository.
Use Vertex Palace before implementing this task.
Use Vertex Palace to find a minimal route.
